revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 19 (old calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 19 (old calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月19日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]10年（[[671年]]_月_日） - [[大海人皇子]]が[[天智天皇]]から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * [[延宝]]7年（[[1679年]]_月_日） - [[高田藩]]の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を江戸幕府大老・[[酒井忠清]]が裁決。家老・小栗美作と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月18日 (旧暦)|10月18日]] 翌日[[10月20日 (旧暦)|10月20日]] - 前月[[9月19日 (旧暦)|9月19日]] 翌月[[11月19日 (旧暦)|11月19日]] *新暦[[10月19日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{stub}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月19日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[671年]][[11月25日]]） - [[天武天皇|大海人皇子]]が[[天智天皇]]から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * [[延宝]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1679年]][[11月22日]]） - [[高田藩]]の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[江戸幕府]]大老・[[酒井忠清]]が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]]と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[11月29日]]） - [[酒井忠清]]、[[江戸時代]]初期の[[譜代大名]]、[[老中]]、[[大老]]（+ [[1681年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永禄]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1567年]][[11月19日]]） - [[武田義信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1538年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}

revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 19'''<!--Lunar October19 is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events == * [[天智天皇]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[671年]][[11月25日]]） - [[天武天皇|大海人皇子]]が[[天智天皇]]から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * [[延宝]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1679年]][[11月22日]]） - [[高田藩]]の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[江戸幕府]]大老・[[酒井忠清]]が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]]と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== Births == * [[寛永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[11月29日]]） - [[酒井忠清]]、[[江戸時代]]初期の[[譜代大名]]、[[老中]]、[[大老]]（+ [[1681年]]）
== Deaths == * [[永禄]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1567年]][[11月19日]]） - [[武田義信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1538年]]）
== Commemorations ==

I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

adding korean to all the dates

[[sn:October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] [[zh:十月十九]] [[en:draft:October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]10年（[[Julian Calendar]][[671]][[11月25日]]） - [[天武天皇|大海人皇子]]が[[天智天皇]]から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * [[延宝]]7年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1679]][[11月22日]]） - [[高田藩]]の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[江戸幕府]]大老・[[酒井忠清]]が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]]と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== Births == * [[寛永]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1624]][[11月29日]]） - [[酒井忠清]]、[[江戸時代]]初期の[[譜代大名]]、[[老中]]、[[大老]]（+ [[1681]]）
== Deaths == * [[永禄]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1567]][[11月19日]]） - [[武田義信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1538]]）

[[sn:October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] [[zh:十月十九]] [[en:draft:October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]10年（[[Julian Calendar]][[671]][[11月25日]]） - [[天武天皇|大海人皇子]]が[[天智天皇]]から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * [[延宝]]7th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1679]][[11月22日]]） - [[高田藩]]の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[江戸幕府]]大老・[[酒井忠清]]が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]]と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== Births == * [[寛永]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1624]][[11月29日]]） - [[酒井忠清]]、[[江戸時代]]初期の[[譜代大名]]、[[老中]]、[[大老]]（+ [[1681]]）
== Deaths == * [[永禄]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1567]][[11月19日]]） - [[武田義信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1538]]）

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[October 19 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] [[zh:十月十九]] [[en:draft:October 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[671]] [[November 25]] ） - [[天武天皇|大海人皇子]] が[[天智天皇]] から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1679]] [[November 22]] ） - [[高田藩]] の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[江戸幕府]] 大老・[[酒井忠清]] が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]] と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[November 29]] ） - [[酒井忠清]] 、[[江戸時代]] 初期の[[譜代大名]] 、[[老中]] 、[[大老]] （+ [[1681]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永禄]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1567]] [[November 19]] ） - [[武田義信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1538]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}

== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[671]] [[November 25]] ） - [[Emperor Tenmu|大海人皇子]] が[[天智天皇]] から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1679]] [[November 22]] ） - [[高田藩]] の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[Tokugawa shogunate]] Tairō・[[酒井忠清]] が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]] と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[November 29]] ） - [[酒井忠清]] 、[[江戸時代]] 初期の[[譜代大名]] 、[[Rōjū]] 、[[Tairō]] （+ [[1681]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1567]] [[November 19]] ） - [[武田義信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1538]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:October 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] [[zh:十月十九]] [[en:draft:October 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[671]] [[November 25]] ） - [[Emperor Tenmu|大海人皇子]] が[[天智天皇]] から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1679]] [[November 22]] ） - [[高田藩]] の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[Tokugawa shogunate]] Tairō・[[酒井忠清]] が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]] と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[November 29]] ） - [[酒井忠清]] 、[[江戸時代]] 初期の[[譜代大名]] 、[[Rōjū]] 、[[Tairō]] （+ [[1681]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1567]] [[November 19]] ） - [[武田義信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1538]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[671]] [[November 25]] ） - [[Emperor Tenmu|大海人皇子]] が[[天智天皇]] から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1679]] [[November 22]] ） - [[高田藩]] の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[Tokugawa shogunate]] Tairō・[[酒井忠清]] が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]] と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[November 29]] ） - [[酒井忠清]] 、[[江戸時代]] 初期の[[譜代大名]] 、[[Rōjū]] 、[[Tairō]] （+ [[1681]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1567]] [[November 19]] ） - [[武田義信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1538]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} 10th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[671]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|大海人皇子}} was entrusted with state affairs by {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}, but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1679]] {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}） – The succession dispute and disturbance in {{ill|Takada Domain|ja|高田藩}} was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府}} Tairō – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi|ja|酒井忠清}} – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1624]] {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}}） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi|ja|酒井忠清}}, an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[1681]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1567]] {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}） – {{ill|Takeda Yoshinobu|ja|武田義信}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) (born {{ill|1538|de|1538|ja|1538|zh|1538}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} 10th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[671]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|大海人皇子}} was entrusted with state affairs by {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}, but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1679]] {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}） – The succession dispute and disturbance in {{ill|Takada Domain|ja|高田藩}} was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府}} Tairō – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi|ja|酒井忠清}} – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1624]] {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}}） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi|ja|酒井忠清}}, an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[1681]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1567]] {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}） – {{ill|Takeda Yoshinobu|ja|武田義信}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) (born {{ill|1538|de|1538|ja|1538|zh|1538}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[671]] {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft}}） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|大海人皇子|12=draft}} was entrusted with state affairs by {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}}, but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1679]] {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日|12=draft}}） – The succession dispute and disturbance in {{ill|Takada Domain|ja|高田藩|12=draft}} was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} Tairō – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi|ja|酒井忠清|12=draft}} – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=draft}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1624]] {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日|12=draft}}） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi|ja|酒井忠清|12=draft}}, an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[1681]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1567]] {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft}}） – {{ill|Takeda Yoshinobu|ja|武田義信|12=draft}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born {{ill|1538|de|1538|ja|1538|zh|1538|12=draft}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]]

13 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:10月19日 (旧暦) up to rev 46623339
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月19日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[671年]][[11月25日]]） - [[天武天皇|大海人皇子]]が[[天智天皇]]から後事を託されるが、これを固辞して出家し吉野に入る * [[延宝]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1679年]][[11月22日]]） - [[高田藩]]の世継ぎ争い・越後騒動を[[江戸幕府]]大老・[[酒井忠清]]が裁決。家老・[[小栗正矩|小栗美作]]と対立していた反小栗派を他家預りとする
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[11月29日]]） - [[酒井忠清]]、[[江戸時代]]初期の[[譜代大名]]、[[老中]]、[[大老]]（+ [[1681年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永禄]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1567年]][[11月19日]]） - [[武田義信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1538年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十九]][[zh:十月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840063]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 19|qq=October 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]][[zh min nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十九]][[zh:十月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840063]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 19|qq=October 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十九]][[zh:十月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840063]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 19|qq=October 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]]
{{translated page|ja|10月19日 (旧暦)|version=46623339|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 19 of Japanese Lunar months]] }}

[[ko:음력 10월 19일]] [[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月十九]]
[[ar:October 19 (Lunisolar)]]
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十九]] {{wikidata link|Q840063}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十九]][[zh:十月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840063]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 19|qq=October 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十九]][[zh:十月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十九]][[zh:十月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十九]][[zh:十月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840063]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 19|qq=October 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 10th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:671|671]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]]） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]], but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1679|1679]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]]） – The succession dispute and disturbance in [[:en:Takada Domain|Takada Domain]] was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]] – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]]） – [[:en:Sakai Tadakiyo|Sakai Tadayoshi]], an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died [[:en:1681|1681]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1567|1567]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]） – [[:en:Takeda Yoshinobu|Takeda Yoshinobu]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1538|1538]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|18|10|20|9|19|11|10|1019|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji}} 10th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|671|en|671|WD=Q30722|lt=671}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25}}） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji}}, but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1679|en|1679|WD=Q7638|lt=1679}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22}}） – The succession dispute and disturbance in {{ill|Takada Domain|en|Takada Domain|WD=Q839422|lt=Takada Domain}} was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – {{ill|Sakai Tadakiyo|en|Sakai Tadakiyo|WD=Q7402769|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi}} – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|WD=Q6821|lt=1624}} {{ill|November 29|en|November 29|WD=Q3016|lt=November 29}}） – {{ill|Sakai Tadakiyo|en|Sakai Tadakiyo|WD=Q7402769|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi}}, an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}}） – {{ill|Takeda Yoshinobu|en|Takeda Yoshinobu|WD=Q837273|lt=Takeda Yoshinobu}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19|1=November 19}}） – {{ill|Takeda Yoshinobu|en|Takeda Yoshinobu|WD=Q837273|lt=Takeda Yoshinobu|1=Takeda Yoshinobu}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji|1=Emperor Tenji}} 10th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|671|en|671|WD=Q30722|lt=671|1=671}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25|1=November 25}}） – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} was entrusted with state affairs by {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji|1=Emperor Tenji}}, but he refused the responsibility and took monastic vows at Yoshino. * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1679|en|1679|WD=Q7638|lt=1679|1=1679}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22|1=November 22}}） – The succession dispute and disturbance in {{ill|Takada Domain|en|Takada Domain|WD=Q839422|lt=Takada Domain|1=Takada Domain}} was adjudicated by the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} Tairō – {{ill|Sakai Tadakiyo|en|Sakai Tadakiyo|WD=Q7402769|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|1=Sakai Tadakiyo}} – with the faction opposed to {{ill|Oguri Masamasa|ja|小栗美作|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguri Masamasa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小栗正矩|1=Mimasaka Oguri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107647136}} (the hereditary retainer) being placed under another house’s custody.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|WD=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} {{ill|November 29|en|November 29|WD=Q3016|lt=November 29|1=November 29}}） – {{ill|Sakai Tadakiyo|en|Sakai Tadakiyo|WD=Q7402769|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|1=Sakai Tadakiyo}}, an early Edo period hereditary daimyō, rōjū, and tairō (died {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19|1=November 19}}） – {{ill|Takeda Yoshinobu|en|Takeda Yoshinobu|WD=Q837273|lt=Takeda Yoshinobu|1=Takeda Yoshinobu}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}}).
